snippet.description:
Dua Lipa - Levitating ft. @DaBaby / Don't Start Now (Live at the GRAMMYs 2021)

Get the album Future Nostalgia : https://dualipa.co/futurenostalgiaвАЛвАЛ

Subscribe to the Dua Lipa channel for all the best and latest official music videos, behind the scenes and live performances.

https://www.youtube.com/playlist?listвАЛвАЛ...

Follow Dua Lipa:
Instagram:  https://dualipa.co/instagramвАЛвАЛ
Facebook: http://dualipa.co/facebookвАЛвАЛ
TikTok: https://www.tiktok.com/@dualipaofficialвАЛвАЛ
Twitter: http://dualipa.co/twitterвАЛвАЛ
YouTube: https://dualipa.co/youtubeвАЛвАЛ

About Dua Lipa:
Born and raised in London to Kosovar-Albanian parents Dua Lipa signed to Warner Records in 2015, releasing her self titled debut in 2017 which featured the hit singles, 'Be The One', 'IDGAF', 'Hotter Than Hell' & her first UK #1 hit 'New Rules'. 

Critical success soon followed as Dua Lipa picked up Brit Awards for 'Best Female Solo Artist' and 'Best British Breakthrough Act' as well as Grammy Awards for 'Best New Artist' and 'Best Dance Recording' for the track 'Electricity' in collaboration with Silk City.

Her second internationally acclaimed studio album 'Future Nostalgia' was released in 2020 and included the hit singles 'Don't Start Now, 'Break My Heart', 'Hallucinate' and 'Levitating', with the remix album 'Club Future Nostalgia' following shortly after featuring guest appearances from 'Blackpink', 'Missy Elliott', 'Madonna' and 'Gwen Stefani'.

#DuaLipaвАЛ #FutureNostalgiaвАЛ #Grammys

snippet.title: ¬°PINTE A MIS HORMIGAS DE VARIOS COLORES!
snippet.description:
¬°Chicos hice un experimento con hormigas y a que no adivinan...tengo hormigas que cambian de color! Se trata de las hormigas fellah o camponotus fellah...he preparado sirop de colores: rosado y azul. Los coloqu√© en un vidrio y espera a que las hormigas fellah llegaran y bebieran el sirop de colores. Resultados inesperados completamente: las hormigas cambian de color! Al beber el sirop de colores sus barrigas cambian de color, es una de las reacciones quimicas mas interesantes que he visto en mi vida, y por su puesto se los mostrar√© en camara lenta para que la diversion y el entretenimiento no tengan limite. Adoro los experimentos caseros como este llenos de curiosidades, para mas videos divertidos y experimentos divertidos...date un paseo por mi canal! No te despegues del canal de los mejores experimentos, si te preguntas que hacer cuando estas aburrido, ya tienes la respuesta! Asi que vamos a experimentar

¬°Suscribir! - https://www.facebook.com/ellocotimon/

вЦЇ Para propuestas comerciales: timon@mediacube.in 

Este canal es la VERSI√УN OFICIAL del canal TimOn ChaveS para la audiencia hispanohablante.

snippet.title: Brawl Stars: Brawl Talk! - Power League, Trophy Road Brawler, and Seasonal Rewards!
snippet.description:
Download NOW!! вЦЇвЦЇ https://supr.cl/playbrawl
Be a BRAWLER! Subscribe! вЦЇвЦЇ https://supr.cl/subscribe

Fast-paced 3v3 multiplayer and battle royale made for mobile! Play with friends or solo across a variety of game modes in under three minutes.

Unlock and upgrade dozens of Brawlers with powerful Super abilities, Star Powers and Gadgets! Collect unique skins to stand out and show off. Battle in a variety of mysterious locations within the Brawliverse!

BATTLE IN MULTIPLE GAME MODES
- Gem Grab (3v3): Team up and out-strategize the opposing team. Collect and hold 10 gems to win, but get fragged and lose your gems.
- Showdown (Solo/Duo): A battle royale style fight for survival. Collect power ups for your Brawler. Grab a friend or play solo - be the last Brawler standing in the rowdiest battle royale yet. Winner take all!
- Brawl Ball (3v3): It's a whole new Brawl game! Show off your soccer/football skills and score two goals before the other team. There are no red cards here.
- Bounty (3v3): Take out opponents to earn stars, but donвАЩt let them pick you off. The squad with the most stars wins the match!
- Heist (3v3): Protect your teamвАЩs safe and try to crack open your opponentsвАЩ. Navigate the map to sneak, blast and blow your way clear to the enemies treasure.
- Special Events: Limited time special PvE and PvP game modes.
- Championship Challenge: Join Brawl Stars' esports scene with in-game qualifiers!

UNLOCK AND UPGRADE BRAWLERS
Collect and upgrade a variety of Brawlers with powerful Super abilities, Star Powers and Gadgets! Level them up and collect unique skins.

BRAWL PASS
Complete quests, open Brawl Boxes, earn Gems, pins and an exclusive Brawl Pass skin! Fresh content every season.

BECOME THE STAR PLAYER
Climb the local and regional leaderboards to prove youвАЩre the greatest Brawler of them all!

CONSTANTLY EVOLVING
Look out for new Brawlers, skins, maps, special events and games modes in the future.

PLEASE NOTE! Brawl Stars is free to download and play, however, some game items can also be purchased for real money. If you don't want to use this feature, please disable in-app purchases in your device's settings. Also, under our Terms of Service and Privacy Policy, you must be at least 9 years of age to play or download Brawl Stars.

Features:
- Team up for real-time 3v3 battles against players from across the world
- A fast-paced multiplayer battle royale mode made for mobile
- Unlock and collect new, powerful Brawlers - each with a signature attack and Super ability
- New events and game modes daily
- Battle solo or with friends
- Climb to the top of the leaderboards in global and local rankings 
- Join or start your own Club with fellow players to share tips and battle together
- Customize Brawlers with unlockable skins
- Player-designed maps offer challenging new terrain to master

From the makers of Clash of Clans, Clash Royale and Boom Beach!

Support:
Contact us in-game via Settings, Help and Support вАФ or visit http://supercell.helpshift.com/a/brawl-stars/

Privacy Policy:
http://supercell.com/en/privacy-policy/

Terms of Service:
http://supercell.com/en/terms-of-service/

Parent's Guide:
http://supercell.com/en/parents/

en.title: Brawl Stars: Brawl Talk! - Power League, Trophy Road Brawler, and Seasonal Rewards!
en.description:
Download NOW!! вЦЇвЦЇ https://supr.cl/playbrawl
Be a BRAWLER! Subscribe! вЦЇвЦЇ https://supr.cl/subscribe

Fast-paced 3v3 multiplayer and battle royale made for mobile! Play with friends or solo across a variety of game modes in under three minutes.

Unlock and upgrade dozens of Brawlers with powerful Super abilities, Star Powers and Gadgets! Collect unique skins to stand out and show off. Battle in a variety of mysterious locations within the Brawliverse!

BATTLE IN MULTIPLE GAME MODES
- Gem Grab (3v3): Team up and out-strategize the opposing team. Collect and hold 10 gems to win, but get fragged and lose your gems.
- Showdown (Solo/Duo): A battle royale style fight for survival. Collect power ups for your Brawler. Grab a friend or play solo - be the last Brawler standing in the rowdiest battle royale yet. Winner take all!
- Brawl Ball (3v3): It's a whole new Brawl game! Show off your soccer/football skills and score two goals before the other team. There are no red cards here.
- Bounty (3v3): Take out opponents to earn stars, but donвАЩt let them pick you off. The squad with the most stars wins the match!
- Heist (3v3): Protect your teamвАЩs safe and try to crack open your opponentsвАЩ. Navigate the map to sneak, blast and blow your way clear to the enemies treasure.
- Special Events: Limited time special PvE and PvP game modes.
- Championship Challenge: Join Brawl Stars' esports scene with in-game qualifiers!

UNLOCK AND UPGRADE BRAWLERS
Collect and upgrade a variety of Brawlers with powerful Super abilities, Star Powers and Gadgets! Level them up and collect unique skins.

BRAWL PASS
Complete quests, open Brawl Boxes, earn Gems, pins and an exclusive Brawl Pass skin! Fresh content every season.

BECOME THE STAR PLAYER
Climb the local and regional leaderboards to prove youвАЩre the greatest Brawler of them all!

CONSTANTLY EVOLVING
Look out for new Brawlers, skins, maps, special events and games modes in the future.

PLEASE NOTE! Brawl Stars is free to download and play, however, some game items can also be purchased for real money. If you don't want to use this feature, please disable in-app purchases in your device's settings. Also, under our Terms of Service and Privacy Policy, you must be at least 9 years of age to play or download Brawl Stars.

Features:
- Team up for real-time 3v3 battles against players from across the world
- A fast-paced multiplayer battle royale mode made for mobile
- Unlock and collect new, powerful Brawlers - each with a signature attack and Super ability
- New events and game modes daily
- Battle solo or with friends
- Climb to the top of the leaderboards in global and local rankings 
- Join or start your own Club with fellow players to share tips and battle together
- Customize Brawlers with unlockable skins
- Player-designed maps offer challenging new terrain to master

From the makers of Clash of Clans, Clash Royale and Boom Beach!

snippet.title: Grab√≥ una de las canciones m√°s famosas de la historia. Gran belleza y una voz √Їnica!
snippet.description:
En este canal vivimos la m√Їsica de los a√±os 60, 70, 80 y 90, c√≥mo si el tiempo no hubiera pasado. Porque recordar es volver a vivir, y la buena m√Їsica siempre estar√° en el coraz√≥n.
Bonnie Tyler es una cantante brit√°nica, compositora, empresaria y fil√°ntropa activa. Es poseedora de una voz muy caracter√≠stica, como ronca o rasgada.

Comenzando como un cantante local en Swansea, Tyler salt√≥ a la fama con el lanzamiento de su √°lbum de 1977 The World Starts Tonight y sus sencillos ¬ЂLost in France¬ї y ¬ЂMore Than a Lover¬ї. Su canci√≥n ¬ЂIt's a Heartache¬ї fue un √©xito a ambos lados del Atl√°ntico, alcanzando el n√Їmero uno en varios pa√≠ses europeos y rompiendo las listas de √©xitos estadounidenses. En 1979 gan√≥ el 10¬Ї Festival Mundial de la Canci√≥n Popular con su canci√≥n ¬ЂSitting on the Edge of the Ocean¬ї. Su carrera alcanz√≥ su punto m√°ximo en la d√©cada de 1980 con su colaboraci√≥n con Jim Steinman, lanzando √©xitos internacionales como ¬ЂTotal Eclipse of the Heart¬ї, ¬ЂHolding Out for a Hero¬ї, ¬ЂIf You Were a Woman (And I Was a Man)¬ї, ¬ЂHere She Comes¬ї y ¬ЂLoving You's a Dirty Job (but Somebody's Gotta Do It)¬ї.

En la d√©cada de 1990 tuvo un mayor √©xito en Europa continental con sencillos como ¬ЂBitterblue¬ї y ¬ЂFools Lullaby¬ї, con el productor alem√°n Dieter Bohlen (cerebro del famoso d√Їo Modern Talking). Tyler hab√≠a continuado con su √©xito en el Reino Unido y Estados Unidos.

Haciendo una reaparici√≥n a finales de 2003 en Francia, Tyler lanz√≥ ¬ЂSi demain... (Turn Around)¬ї con Kareen Antonn, que fue n√Їmero uno en Francia durante diez semanas, vendiendo m√°s de 700.000 copias. En los √Їltimos a√±os ha aparecido en varios programas de televisi√≥n del Reino Unido; por ejemplo, hizo un cameo en la telenovela brit√°nica Hollyoaks. M√°s tarde estuvo de gira con Robin Gibb en 2010 y con Status Quo en 2012. Su √°lbum Rocks and Honey tuvo un √©xito moderado en Europa, con su sencillo ¬ЂBelieve in Me¬ї con el cual represent√≥ al Reino Unido en el Festival de la Canci√≥n de Eurovisi√≥n, quedando en el puesto 19 con 23 puntos.вАЛ Posteriormente, Tyler gan√≥ el premio ESC Radio a la mejor canci√≥n y la mejor artista femenina, marc√°ndola como la primera representante del Reino Unido en recibir dos premios.вАЛ Sus √Їltimos sencillos, ¬ЂThis is Gonna Hurt¬ї y ¬ЂLove is the Knife¬ї fueron lanzados en agosto y septiembre de 2013, respectivamente, y en el 2013 realiz√≥ una gira por Sud√°frica.

Tyler ha colaborado con varios cantantes incluyendo Cher, Meat Loaf, Mike Oldfield, Frankie Miller, Vince Gill y Andrea Bocelli y ha lanzado m√°s de 30 sencillos a d√Їo desde 1983.

Con una carrera que abarca casi cuatro d√©cadas, ha ganado tres premios Goldene Europa, un premio Echo, y ha sido nominada a tres Premios Brit y tres Premios Grammy. Su distintiva voz ronca, como resultado de una operaci√≥n para extirpar n√≥dulos vocales, ha tenido en ella la comparaci√≥n con artistas como Rod Stewart y Kim Carnes, y se ha llegado a conocer como ¬ЂLa Primera Dama del Rock¬ї.
#MusicaDeLos70y80

Desde que empec√© est√°n pendientes 
Si lo hago bien o lo hago mal 
Pero que bien se siente caerse y volverlo a intentar 

Hasta el que mas dijo que era for real cambi√≥ 
Hasta el que menos se la vio le cabi√≥ 
Ellos se la pasan pendiente a m√≠
mientras yo me la paso tumbaoвАЩ
tirando free en el sill√≥n

Ya se sabe cual es mi lugar 
Y al que no le caiga bien me va a tener que tragar 
Esa trama la conozco de principio a final 
Y este juego no esta hecho paвАЩ mi dificultad 

Ahora estoy en la grasa 
Dani tiene el OK en la plaza 
No puedo evitar cantar paвАЩ las masas 
Pero puedo hacer que se cuestionen lo que pasa 

Desde que empec√© est√°n pendientes 
Si lo hago bien o lo hago mal 
Pero que bien se siente caerse y volver a intentar 
A golpes me hice fuerte, aunque me cueste diferenciar 
Si ese golpe corriente ,  otra vez es ansiedad 

Ya estoy acostumbrado, a que tiren beef y despu√©s miren pal costado
eso no es naвАЩ nuevo hacen todo por dinero 
detr√°s de lo caro est√° la otra cara de la moneda que no conocemos  
este mundo es un pa√±uelo

G√°nense el respeto que es probable que sea lo √Їnico que nos llevemos

Y lo pongo a romper 
Les falta nafta paвАЩ quererme correr 
Ustedes yendo y ya estoy por volver 
Con el mundo a mis pies 

Gracias a dios 
A m√≠ nunca me import√≥ lo que digan 
ese es el secreto paвАЩ llegar arriba 
Cada vez hay mas gente que nos mira 
Y la realidad es m√°s grande que la expectativa 

Mientras ustedes hablan mentiras
yo soy el protagonista de las historias que narro
ac√° las palabras duelen mas que los disparos por eso en barras descargo
